name: player career year different season types
description: Test case for career year column with different season types (REG, POST, PRE)
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b.career_year as career_year_0, "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" as "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed" on "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."year" = 2025 and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "player_seasonlogs" as "ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b" on "ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b"."year" = 2023 and "ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b"."seas_type" = 'POST' where t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed.career_year >= '1' group by player.fname, player.lname, ta2cf3dc4e23d06ead63670237080650b.career_year, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 ASC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
